about: North American weather radar site registry. Dashed rings show nominal low-level reflectivity reach per agency documentation — an aggregation of overlapping circles, not seamless coverage. Terrain, beam height, and outages create gaps.
coverageNote: No objective 100% precipitation truth. US composites (e.g. MRMS) merge NEXRAD/TDWR sweeps; Canada uses MSC S-band products. Areas outside all rings are uncovered by this network.
